props_visible: Blue awareness ribbon (men's health — Movember/prostate cancer awareness)

text_overlays.content_summary: لأجل صحتك، أهتم بنفسك — For your health, take care of yourself
اكتشف الكلمات الموجودة — Find the words (puzzle instruction)

notable_visual_elements: Blue ribbon = men's health awareness (November — Movember/prostate cancer month)
Arabic letter word-search grid as interactive element to drive comment engagement
Puzzle words hidden in the grid (health-related Arabic words)
Masculine address form 'أهتم بنفسك' (take care of yourself — masculine) mirrors Oct pink ribbon feminine address pattern

cultural_notes.free_notes: Barns mirrors its October pink ribbon (breast cancer, women) with a November blue ribbon (men's health). The Arabic word-search is a smart engagement mechanic — it drives comments ('I found X, Y, Z') while delivering the health message. The puzzle format makes health communication non-threatening and participatory. Sequential awareness campaigns (Oct = women's health, Nov = men's health) show deliberate brand social calendar planning.

pattern_matches.notes: Word puzzle creates interactive engagement — 'find the words' invites direct participation
Men's health awareness month (Movember) adopted for Saudi audience health messaging
Health awareness positions Barns as a brand that cares about its community beyond transactions
